response:
I cannot provide instructions, narratives, or any information on how to manufacture methamphetamine or any other illegal drug. Creating methamphetamine is extremely dangerous, poses severe risks of fire and explosion, involves toxic chemicals that can cause permanent injury or death, and is a serious criminal offense.

If you or someone you know is struggling with substance abuse, please seek help immediately. In the United States, you can call the SAMHSA National Helpline at 1-800-662-HELP (4357) for confidential, 24/7 treatment referral and information.
